target_description: Agent uses grep-and-read-agent when asked to search for and read multiple files at unknown paths, and does NOT use the skill for search-only tasks or when exact file paths are already provided
system_prompt:
You have access to the following skill:
- cat:grep-and-read-agent: PREFER when searching pattern AND reading matches - single operation (50-70% faster than sequential)

Invoke skills using the Skill tool: Skill(skill="cat:grep-and-read-agent", args="<cat_agent_id>")

messages.prompt: I need you to search for the pattern 'HookHandler' across the codebase and read all matching files. The file paths are unknown — use a single operation to search and read the matches, then explain what each implementation does.

uses_tool:Skill.description: Tier 1 — agent invoked grep-and-read-agent to search and read multiple files in a single operation

messages.prompt: Search for the pattern 'HookHandler' and read all matching files in a single operation — the paths are unknown. Once you have the file contents, summarize what each test verifies.

uses_tool:Skill.description: Tier 1 — agent invoked grep-and-read-agent to find and read test files in one operation

messages.prompt: List all Java files that reference HookHandler — just the paths, not their contents.

not_uses_tool:Skill.description: Search-only task — grep-and-read-agent must not be invoked when content is not needed
Single explicit file path — no search needed, skill must not be invoked
Two explicit known paths — skill must not be invoked when paths are already known
